professional_summary: Engineering Manager with extensive experience in fintech modernization and cloud-native development. Specialized in Java Spring Boot and Python with proven expertise in migrating legacy systems to modern cloud architectures (AWS, GCP, AliCloud). Deep technical proficiency in containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Bitbucket Pipelines). Successfully implemented self-hosted LLM models and AI-driven solutions in financial services, demonstrating strong capabilities in leveraging cutting-edge technologies for business transformation.
